extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity. I counted only the “Against” rows: criminal proceedings are Nil for the Company, Promoters, Promoter Group, Directors and Subsidiaries; statutory/regulatory proceedings are also Nil, while tax proceedings against the Company are 2 (the Promoter and Director tax matters are excluded because the requested tax count is limited to the Company and its subsidiaries); all “By” rows were excluded. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and subsidiaries is ₹69.58 lakhs for the Company’s against row, with subsidiaries marked NA; the table footnote states that aggregate amounts relate to outstanding tax demands, so this is ₹0.6958 crore. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated-looking “Total” of ₹644.44 lakhs as at September 30, 2024, converted to ₹6.4444 crore, rather than a re-sum of line items. Company-wide customer concentration for the latest full fiscal year, Fiscal 2024, is 57.67% for the top five and 75.69% for the top ten, measured against revenue from operations; the source tables use ₹ in lakhs, converted to crore by dividing by 100.
